label: 1711 Authorization of appropriations for hiring and training Government personnel

children.heading: INS inspectors
children.label: 1 INS inspectors
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, during each of the fiscal years 2003 through 2006, the Attorney General shall increase the number of inspectors and associated support staff in the Immigration and Naturalization Service by the equivalent of at least 200 full-time employees over the number of inspectors and associated support staff in the Immigration and Naturalization Service authorized by the USA PATRIOT Act.

children.heading: INS investigative personnel
children.label: 2 INS investigative personnel
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations, during each of the fiscal years 2003 through 2006, the Attorney General shall increase the number of investigative and associated support staff of the Immigration and Naturalization Service by the equivalent of at least 200 full-time employees over the number of investigators and associated support staff in the Immigration and Naturalization Service authorized by the USA PATRIOT Act.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 3 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out this subsection, including such sums as may be necessary to provide facilities, attorney personnel and support staff, and other resources needed to support the increased number of inspectors, investigative staff, and associated support staff.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for INS staffing
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations for INS staffing

children.heading: In general1So in original. No par. (2) has been enacted.1
children.label: 1 In general1So in original. No par. (2) has been enacted.1
A
children.text: for all journeyman Border Patrol agents and inspectors who have completed at least one year’s service and are receiving an annual rate of basic pay for positions at GS–9 of the General Schedule under from the annual rate of basic pay payable for positions at GS–9 of the General Schedule under such section 5332, to an annual rate of basic pay payable for positions at GS–11 of the General Schedule under such section 5332;section 5332 of title 5

children.label: B
children.text: for inspections assistants, from the annual rate of basic pay payable for positions at GS–5 of the General Schedule under to an annual rate of basic pay payable for positions at GS–7 of the General Schedule under such section 5332; andsection 5332 of title 5

children.label: C
children.text: for the support staff associated with the personnel described in subparagraphs (A) and (B), at the appropriate GS level of the General Schedule under such section 5332.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for training
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations for training
A
children.text: to ensure that their proficiency levels are acceptable to protect the borders of the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: otherwise to enforce and administer the laws within their jurisdiction;
to provide adequate continuing cross-training to agencies staffing the United States border and ports of entry to effectively and correctly apply applicable United States laws;
to fully train immigration officers to use the appropriate lookout databases and to monitor passenger traffic patterns; and
to expand the Carrier Consultant Program described in .section 1225a(b) of this title2See References in Text note below.2

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for consular functions
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations for consular functions
A
children.text: implement enhanced security measures for the review of visa applicants;

children.label: B
children.text: staff the facilities and programs associated with the activities described in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: C
children.text: provide ongoing training for consular officers and diplomatic security agents.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 2 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for the Department of State such sums as may be necessary to carry out paragraph (1).
